mainText: Today's top stories: XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending, Google just redesigned the search box, New benchmark exposes how badly AI struggles, More people get news from AI chatbots, but, Amazon drops its OpenAI drama film after signing, Google Deepmind loses another top AI researcher, China Opens World’s First Wind-Powered Underwater Data Center, There’s Finally Video of a Great White Shark, Alleged China ties at SK Telecom alarmed US
